title: Cowboy Clean Fuels and Mercuria Announce Landmark Offtake Agreement for Carbon-Negative Renewable Natural Gas
content: Cowboy Clean Fuels (CCF), a Wyoming-based climate tech and energy transition company, today announced a groundbreaking offtake agreement with Mercuria, one of the world's leading independent energy and commodity trading groups. This partnership marks the first commercial agreement for the sale of Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) generated under CCF's pioneering BiCRS+RNG Methodology at the company's Triangle Unit Project near Gillette, Wyoming.
author: Analysts Account
